---
title: "VIN v2: Component Architecture Diagrams (Mermaid)"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
    code-tools: false
---

This page contains **Mermaid architecture diagrams** of the major components in
`oracle_rri/oracle_rri/vin/experimental/model_v2.py` (VIN v2).

The goal is to make it easy to cross-check the implementation against the paper
and to reason about ablations (e.g., enabling/disabling semidense frustum MHCA,
PointNeXt, trajectory attention, voxel-valid-fraction gating).

## 1) Pose preparation + pose encoder

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    cand["Candidate poses<br/>PoseTW world←cam<br/>(B×N)"] --> cw
    ref["Reference pose<br/>PoseTW world←rig_ref<br/>(B)"] --> cw
    cw["Undo CW90 correction<br/>(optional)"] --> compose
    compose["Compose candidate pose in rig frame<br/>T rig_ref←cam = T world←rig_ref^-1 · T world←cam"] --> enc
    enc["PoseEncoder.encode()<br/>R6D + LFF"] --> pose_enc["pose_enc<br/>(B×N×d_pose)"]
    enc --> pose_vec["pose_vec<br/>(B×N×9)"]
    enc --> center["candidate_center_rig_m<br/>(B×N×3)"]
```

## 2) EVL scene field construction (voxel heads → compact field)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    occ_pr["EVL occ_pr"] --> field_aux
    occ_in["EVL occ_input"] --> field_aux
    cent["EVL cent_pr"] --> field_aux
    counts["EVL counts"] --> counts_norm

    counts_norm["counts_norm<br/>log1p(counts)/log1p(max)"] --> unknown
    counts_norm --> field_aux

    unknown["unknown = 1 - counts_norm"] --> new_surface
    new_surface["new_surface_prior = unknown · occ_pr"] --> field_aux

    free_in["EVL free_input<br/>(or derived)"] --> field_aux

    field_aux["Select channels<br/>scene_field_channels"] --> concat
    concat["Concat → F_in<br/>(B×C_in×D×H×W)"] --> proj
    proj["Conv3d 1×1×1 + GroupNorm + GELU"] --> field["Field F<br/>(B×C×D×H×W)"]
```

## 3) Voxel-valid-fraction (coverage proxy) and gating

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    centers["Candidate centers (world)<br/>t world←cam"] --> sample
    counts_norm["counts_norm volume"] --> sample
    sample["_sample_voxel_field<br/>@ candidate center"] --> cn["counts_norm_center"]
    sample --> inb["center_in_bounds mask"]
    finite["pose_finite mask"] --> frac
    cn --> frac
    inb --> frac
    frac["voxel_valid_frac<br/>cn · inb · finite"] --> gate
    gate["Gate (optional)<br/>Linear(1→C)+Sigmoid"] --> global_mod["global_feat · gate"]
```

## 4) Global context: pose-conditioned pooling + MH cross-attention

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    field["Voxel field F<br/>(B×C×D×H×W)"] --> pool
    pool["Pool to tokens<br/>G×G×G → T=G^3"] --> tokens["Voxel tokens<br/>(B×T×C)"]

    pts["EVL pts_world<br/>(voxel grid centers)"] --> pos_grid
    t_vox["T world←voxel"] --> pos_grid
    rig_ref["T world←rig_ref"] --> pos_grid
    extent["voxel_extent"] --> pos_grid
    pos_grid["pos_grid_from_pts_world<br/>voxel centers in rig_ref"] --> pos_lff["LFF(pos)"]

    pose_enc["pose_enc<br/>(B×N×d_pose)"] --> attn
    tokens --> attn
    pos_lff --> attn
    attn["PoseConditionedGlobalPool<br/>MH cross-attn"] --> global["global_feat<br/>(B×N×C)"]
```

## 5) Semidense sampling + candidate projection (shared across branches)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    snippet["Snippet view<br/>EfmSnippetView / VinSnippetView"] --> collapse
    collapse["collapse_points / cached points<br/>max_points + inv_dist_std + obs_count"] --> pts["points_world (+ extras)"]

    cams["PerspectiveCameras<br/>(B×N flattened)"] --> proj
    pts --> proj
    proj["transform_points_screen<br/>→ x,y,z + valid mask"] --> proj_data["proj_data<br/>x,y,z,valid,extras"]
```

## 6) Semidense projection statistics (per-candidate summary)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    proj_data["proj_data"] --> grid
    grid["2D grid binning<br/>coverage + empty_frac"] --> stats
    proj_data --> visfrac
    visfrac["semidense_candidate_vis_frac<br/>valid_count / finite_count"] --> stats
    proj_data --> depth
    depth["depth mean/std<br/>(optional inv_dist_std weighting)"] --> stats
    stats["sem_proj = (coverage, empty_frac,<br/>vis_frac, depth_mean, depth_std)"] --> film
    film["FiLM(global_feat, sem_proj)<br/>γ,β = Linear(sem_proj)"] --> global_mod["global_feat (modulated)"]
```

## 7) Semidense frustum MHCA (token-level view conditioning)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    proj_data["proj_data"] --> tokens
    tokens["Tokens τ_i,k<br/>(x_norm,y_norm,depth,<br/>inv_dist_std, obs_count_norm)"] --> trunc
    trunc["Truncate to K points<br/>semidense_frustum_max_points"] --> vis_embed
    vis_embed["Add vis token embedding<br/>(optional)"] --> attn

    pose_enc["pose_enc (query)"] --> qproj
    qproj["Linear pose→Q"] --> attn
    vis_embed --> kvproj
    kvproj["Linear token→KV"] --> attn

    attn["MH cross-attn + residual + MLP<br/>(optional invalid masking)"] --> frustum["semidense_frustum<br/>(B×N×C)"]
```

## 8) Optional PointNeXt semidense encoder (snippet-level)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    pts["semidense points_world (+ extras)"] --> to_rig
    rig_ref["T world←rig_ref"] --> to_rig
    to_rig["Transform points to rig_ref"] --> pointnext
    pointnext["PointNeXtSEncoder (frozen)<br/>→ pooled embedding"] --> sem_feat["semidense_feat<br/>(B×d_point)"]
    sem_feat --> film
    film["FiLM(global_feat, semidense_feat)<br/>γ,β = Linear(sem_feat)"] --> global_mod["global_feat (modulated)"]
```

## 9) Optional trajectory encoder + candidate-query attention

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    traj["Trajectory poses<br/>T world←rig(t)"] --> to_rig
    rig_ref["T world←rig_ref"] --> to_rig
    to_rig["Transform to rig_ref"] --> enc
    enc["TrajectoryEncoder.encode_poses<br/>→ per-frame encodings"] --> pooled["traj_feat pooled<br/>(B×d_traj)"]
    enc --> per_frame["traj_pose_enc<br/>(B×F×d_pose)"]

    pose_enc["pose_enc (query)<br/>(B×N×d_pose)"] --> attn
    per_frame --> attn
    attn["MH cross-attn over frames<br/>→ traj_ctx"] --> ctx["traj_ctx<br/>(B×N×d_pose)"]
```

## 10) Feature fusion + CORAL head (ordinal RRI)

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
    pose["pose_enc"] --> concat
    global["global_feat (modulated)"] --> concat
    proj["sem_proj"] --> concat
    frustum["semidense_frustum (optional)"] --> concat
    point["semidense_feat (optional)"] --> concat
    traj["traj_ctx (optional)"] --> concat
    voxel["voxel_valid_frac (optional features)"] --> concat

    concat["concat → h_i<br/>(B×N×D)"] --> flat
    flat["flatten (B·N×D)"] --> mlp["MLP"]
    mlp --> coral["CORAL layer<br/>(K-1 logits)"]
    coral --> out["prob + expected RRI"]
```
